name: org.machanism.machai:assembly-maven-plugin
description: Assembly Maven Plugin (org.machanism.machai:assembly-maven-plugin) is a Maven plugin (packaging: maven-plugin) in the Machanism MachAI ecosystem that automates AI-assisted assembly of a target project directory (typically the Maven execution ${basedir}). It exposes the Maven goal "assembly" implemented by org.machanism.machai.assembly.maven.Assembly (an org.apache.maven.plugin.AbstractMojo annotated with @Mojo(name="assembly", requiresProject=false, requiresDependencyCollection=ResolutionScope.NONE)). The goal executes a two-phase workflow driven by a natural-language prompt: (1) prompt acquisition and library recommendation: reads the prompt from a configurable file (plugin/system property "assembly.prompt.file", default "project.txt") or, if the file does not exist, requests the prompt interactively via org.codehaus.plexus.components.interactivity.Prompter; then initializes a configuration source backed by bindex.properties (org.machanism.macha.core.commons.configurator.PropertiesConfigurator) and creates org.machanism.machai.bindex.Picker using the provider id "pick.genai" (Picker.MODEL_PROP_NAME, default Picker.DEFAULT_MODEL, e.g., OpenAI:gpt-5-mini). The picker is configured with a minimum score threshold (property "assembly.score", default ApplicationAssembly.DEFAULT_SCORE_VALUE, 0.8) and returns a list of recommended libraries as org.machanism.machai.schema.Bindex entries; the plugin logs each recommended bindex id and its score via picker.getScore(id) and exits early if no libraries are recommended. Notably, the picker is instantiated with an internal MongoDB Atlas connection string "mongodb+srv://user:user@" + Picker.DB_URL, and the plugin still exposes an optional "bindex.register.url" parameter (for registration/lookup) for compatibility with the broader ecosystem configuration, though the concrete usage depends on Picker internals and configuration. (2) project assembly: initializes org.machanism.machai.bindex.ApplicationAssembly using the provider id "assembly.genai" (ApplicationAssembly.MODEL_PROP_NAME, default ApplicationAssembly.DEFAULT_MODEL, e.g., OpenAI:gpt-5), points it at the Maven basedir (assembly.projectDir(basedir)), and runs assembly.assembly(prompt, bindexList) to apply AI-assisted changes to the project directory (scaffolding, dependency integration, packaging-related adjustments) guided by the prompt and the selected bindex metadata. The plugin is designed for Maven CLI usage and CI/CD pipelines to drive metadata-based library selection and automated project changes using GenAI-powered semantic search over bindex metadata, with separate model selection for recommendation vs. application to optimize cost/latency.

usageContext: Automated library recommendation and integration using bindex metadata

constructors.description: Creates a new Maven Mojo instance for the "assembly" goal. Configuration is injected via Maven @Parameter fields and system properties. At execution time the Mojo reads a natural-language assembly prompt from a file or via interactive prompting, runs a Picker phase to recommend libraries as Bindex entries, filters by a score threshold, logs recommended artifacts and their scores, and then runs ApplicationAssembly to apply changes to the target project directory (the Maven basedir).

examples.description: Runs the "assembly" goal from the command line, configuring separate GenAI providers for picking and assembly, reading the prompt from project.txt, and requiring a minimum recommendation score of 0.8.

features.name: assembly
features.description: Implements the Maven "assembly" goal. Reads an assembly prompt from the configured file (property "assembly.prompt.file", default "project.txt") if it exists; otherwise requests the prompt interactively using org.codehaus.plexus.components.interactivity.Prompter. Creates a configuration source backed by bindex.properties (org.machanism.macha.core.commons.configurator.PropertiesConfigurator). Creates and configures org.machanism.machai.bindex.Picker (via createPicker) using the pick model property (Picker.MODEL_PROP_NAME / "pick.genai") and sets the score threshold from "assembly.score" (default ApplicationAssembly.DEFAULT_SCORE_VALUE). Calls picker.pick(query) to obtain recommended org.machanism.machai.schema.Bindex entries; if empty, logs and exits. Otherwise logs each recommended bindex id with its score (picker.getScore(id)). Then creates org.machanism.machai.bindex.ApplicationAssembly (via createAssembly) using the assembly model property (ApplicationAssembly.MODEL_PROP_NAME / "assembly.genai"), sets the project directory to the Maven basedir (assembly.projectDir(basedir)), and runs assembly.assembly(query, bindexList) to apply AI-assisted changes to the project directory. Wraps IO and prompting errors into org.apache.maven.plugin.MojoExecutionException.

examples.description: Runs the plugin goal with explicit providers for picking and assembly, reads the prompt from project.txt, and filters recommendations with score >= 0.8.
If the prompt file does not exist, the Mojo requests the prompt interactively from the user using the Maven/plexus prompter.
Runs the goal while providing an optional bindex registration/lookup endpoint configuration, used by the picker via configuration depending on Picker implementation.

customizations.name: assembly.genai
customizations.description: System property / plugin configuration parameter selecting the GenAI provider id for the assembly phase (used to apply changes to the project). Bound to org.machanism.machai.bindex.ApplicationAssembly.MODEL_PROP_NAME; default is org.machanism.machai.bindex.ApplicationAssembly.DEFAULT_MODEL (documented in code as OpenAI:gpt-5).

examples.description: Sets the GenAI provider used for the assembly phase.

customizations.name: pick.genai
customizations.description: System property / plugin configuration parameter selecting the GenAI provider id for the picker phase (used to recommend candidate libraries as Bindex entries). Bound to org.machanism.machai.bindex.Picker.MODEL_PROP_NAME; default is org.machanism.machai.bindex.Picker.DEFAULT_MODEL (documented in code as OpenAI:gpt-5-mini).

examples.description: Sets the GenAI provider used for the recommendation (picker) phase.

customizations.name: assembly.prompt.file
customizations.description: System property / plugin configuration parameter specifying the text file that contains the natural-language assembly prompt. If the file does not exist, the prompt is requested interactively via org.codehaus.plexus.components.interactivity.Prompter. Default: project.txt.

examples.description: Reads the assembly prompt from project.txt.

customizations.name: assembly.score
customizations.description: System property / plugin configuration parameter specifying the minimum score threshold for recommended libraries produced by org.machanism.machai.bindex.Picker. Default: 0.8 (org.machanism.machai.bindex.ApplicationAssembly.DEFAULT_SCORE_VALUE).

examples.description: Requires recommendations to have a score of at least 0.95.

customizations.name: bindex.register.url
customizations.description: Optional system property / plugin configuration parameter providing a registration/lookup endpoint used by the picker via configuration for bindex metadata lookup/registration (actual usage depends on Picker internals).

examples.description: Configures the goal with a remote registry endpoint for bindex metadata lookup/registration.
Command-line invocation configuring both phases and using a prompt file.
Example Maven POM configuration providing parameters via plugin configuration.
